name: Workflow
whatItDoes: Explores ideas through collaborative dialogue before implementation. Asks questions one at a time, proposes 2-3 approaches with tradeoffs, and presents a design for approval before any code is written.
whenToUse: Before any creative work — creating features, building components, modifying behavior.
exampleUse: DevToolkit design was brainstormed through multiple choice questions before any code was written.
